qg_verdicts.title: Cooling-Rate-Dependent Fibril Polymorph Selection in Insulin: Three-Arm Mechanism Discrimination
qg_verdicts.lineage: C1-H7 (prion, KILLED in critique) -> Evolver pivot to insulin -> E3-H7xH5 -> C2-H7
qg_verdicts.key_strength: Three-arm discriminant design distinguishing eigenmode mechanism from Arrhenius null. Perfect citation integrity (3/3 verified). Near-term wet-lab feasible (ThT + cryo-EM, 2-3 months). T_cross prediction 45-55C is unique falsifiable output.
qg_verdicts.key_risk: Polymorph selection may be dominated by elongation-phase templating, not monomer eigenmode state.
qg_verdicts.why_this_one_passed: Evolver pivot from PrP (computationally infeasible, massive conformational change) to insulin (tractable at pH 2, existing trajectory data, well-characterized fibrillation) was decisive. System replacement > mechanism refinement for this kill class.

qg_verdicts.title: Spectral Entropy Production Rate Distinguishes Folding from Misfolding Pathways
qg_verdicts.key_strength: All 4 citations verified, zero errors. Sigma-spike mechanism grounded by Schnakenberg 1976 + Yu 2015 D_misfold/D_fold measurement. Sharp 70%/80% threshold predictions.
conditions: Noise model for sigma-spike vs MSM estimation artifact distinction
DT-to-CT conversion and lag-time dependence clarification

qg_verdicts.title: Refined Hierarchical Spectral Scoring with Yu et al. D_misfold Calibration
qg_verdicts.key_strength: Highest groundedness in session (8/10). Most complete causal chain: roughness -> bimodality -> M_eff -> aggregation. Self-refuting prediction range (rho 0.4-0.7) is exemplary calibration.
conditions: Address force spectroscopy to free-diffusion transferability
Define D_fold for IDPs or restrict to structured proteins

qg_verdicts.title: Mpemba-Guided Aggregation Inhibitor Design: Small Molecules That Maximize Eigenmode Overlap Disruption
qg_verdicts.key_strength: Best citation accuracy in session (4/4 verified, zero errors). Eigenmode-overlap-guided drug design is a genuinely novel paradigm. TTR/tafamidis retrospective validation well-designed.
qg_verdicts.key_risk: Abeta42 IDP has no stable pockets; eigenmode landscape changes upon ligand binding.
conditions: Pivot primary system from Abeta42 to TTR (structured protein, known binding site)
Address eigenmode change upon ligand binding

qg_verdicts.title: Chaperone-Modulated Mpemba Index: Hsp70 Binding Selectively Reduces Slow-Eigenmode Overlap
qg_verdicts.key_strength: Conceptually elegant (Hsp70 as biological Mpemba protocol). All 4 citations verified. Age-dependent chaperone decline framing is creative.
qg_verdicts.key_risk: Central assumption (Hsp70 binding sites map to high-|v_slow| microstates) untested. Hsp70 targets oligomers not monomers for Abeta42.

qg_verdicts.title: Evolutionary Mpemba Tradeoff: Amyloidogenic Sequences Persist Because High Mpemba Index Enables Rapid Native Folding
qg_verdicts.key_strength: All 3 citations verified. Evolutionary dual-use framing is genuinely novel.
qg_verdicts.key_risk: CRITICAL: IDP folding rate is undefined — excludes half of amyloid-disease-relevant proteins. Contact order confound unaddressed.
conditions: Restrict scope to non-IDP amyloid proteins (TTR, lysozyme, beta-2-microglobulin)
Add partial correlation controlling for contact order (Plaxco 1998)

qg_verdicts.title: Resource-Theoretic Mpemba Vulnerability Score: Relative Entropy of A* Ensemble as Unified Aggregation Predictor
qg_verdicts.kill_reason: FABRICATED CITATION: 'Avanzini et al. 2026 PRX 16:011065' — paper exists but authors are Summer, Moroder, Bettmann, Turkeshi, Marvian, Goold. 'Avanzini' is not an author. Per QG rules: fabricated citation = automatic FAIL. Additionally, D_KL spectral formula is wrong (chi-squared divergence, not KL divergence).
qg_verdicts.recurrence_pattern: Same hypothesis lineage had 3 citation errors in cycle 1. Avanzini confabulation persisted from cycle 1 despite explicit Critic flag. Generator-level systematic error not corrected by self-critique.
qg_verdicts.concept_merit: HIGH — resource-theoretic KL divergence as Mpemba monotone is genuinely powerful. Could be rebuilt on correct foundations (Summer et al. 2026, arXiv 2507.16976).

qg_verdicts.title: Mpemba Index from Patient-Derived Tau PTM Variants as Personalized Tauopathy Progression Biomarker
qg_verdicts.kill_reason: TWO independent critical errors: (1) Anatomy error — T217 is at position 217, OUTSIDE the K18 fragment (residues 244-372), making the core mechanistic claim anatomically impossible; (2) Citation misattributed — Cell 180:633 is Arakhamia et al., not Wesseling.
qg_verdicts.concept_merit: LOW in current form — anatomy error invalidates the entire mechanistic chain

pipeline_rank.novelty_type: highest in pipeline history (surpasses S017 at 3.0)

highest_paradigm_potential.note: Concept is the most ambitious unification in session. Should be rebuilt with correct Summer et al. 2026 citation.

cross_domain_bonus.rationale: All 15 hypotheses bridge statistical mechanics/non-equilibrium physics AND protein biochemistry/amyloid disease. Zero cross-field citations confirmed by 6 independent web searches.

bridge_type_analysis.bridge_type_introduced: Physics anomaly formalism repurposed as protein conformational diagnostic
bridge_type_analysis.definition: A physics anomaly (Mpemba effect) whose theoretical resolution uses spectral decomposition of a Markov operator is applied to protein folding MSMs, which independently use identical spectral decomposition. The bridge is not analogical — the mathematical objects (transition matrices, eigenmodes, eigenvalue spectra) are literally the same in both fields. Novelty is recognizing that the Mpemba index (overlap integral with slowest eigenmode) has a direct biological interpretation as aggregation propensity.

kills_in_critique.description: Standard MSM tools (PyEMMA, MSMBuilder) enforce detailed balance -> symmetrize transition matrix -> normal matrix -> Henrici delta(Q)=0 by construction. Non-normality structurally impossible in reversible MSMs.
kills_in_critique.prevention: Before proposing a mathematical property that requires breaking a symmetry, verify the standard tool does NOT impose that symmetry. Rescue: specify non-equilibrium condition breaking detailed balance (Hsp70 ATPase cycling, irreversible aggregation sinks) and use non-symmetrized estimators (dtram, MBAR).

kills_in_critique.description: PrP C->Sc involves massive alpha->beta conformational change (~50 kDa). Beyond current MD capabilities. Cellular cofactors (lipids, RNA) absent from models. PrP strain selection cannot be reproduced without cofactors.
kills_in_critique.prevention: Pivot to nearest tractable system sharing the key mechanistic property (fibril polymorphism). Insulin at pH 2, beta-2-microglobulin at pH 2.5 — both have existing trajectory data and tractable MSM construction.

kills_at_qg.pattern: Partial citation hallucination — correct venue/year, fabricated first author
kills_at_qg.description: Journal (PRX), year (2026), volume correct; first author 'Avanzini' fabricated. Actual: Summer, Moroder, Bettmann, Turkeshi, Marvian, Goold. Same hypothesis lineage had 3 errors in cycle 1. Avanzini confabulation persisted despite explicit Critic flag.
kills_at_qg.prevention: For papers published <6 months, verify first author name via search. Venue and year are recalled reliably; author attribution for recent papers is hallucination-prone. Never cite a 2025-2026 paper without first-author web verification.

kills_at_qg.description: T217 is at position 217, OUTSIDE the K18 fragment (residues 244-372). Core mechanistic claim anatomically impossible. Additionally, Wesseling misattributed to Cell 180:633 (actually Arakhamia et al.).
kills_at_qg.prevention: For hypotheses specifying amino acid position interactions with protein fragments, verify that the residue position falls within the fragment range. Trivial coordinate check: does position X fall in range A-B? Required before generation.

kill_pattern_analysis.shared_session_weakness: All 15 hypotheses share the single-molecule MSM to multi-molecule aggregation gap. Amyloid nucleation is dominated by concentration-dependent secondary nucleation (Cohen et al. 2013 PNAS 110:9758). This structural weakness caps most hypotheses at CONDITIONAL_PASS. Solution: provide explicit quantitative translation — rate constant upper bound, flux inequality, or direct experimental handle — bridging the monomer eigenmode to population-level kinetics.
new_kill_patterns: K14: mechanism impossible by mathematical construction (detailed balance symmetry)
K15: partial citation hallucination — correct venue/year, fabricated first author

cycle_1_error_types: wrong_paper_type (Robustelli 2018 is force field not MSM)
citation_hallucination_tracking.cross_session_pattern: Citation hallucination error CLASS evolves each session but structural hallucination persists. S004: fabricated paper. S013: wrong journal. S014: opposite conclusion. S017: review substituted for primary. S018: correct venue, fabricated first author. LLMs recall venue and year reliably; author attribution for recent papers is systematically hallucination-prone.

self_critique_effectiveness.finding: Critic correctly identified all cycle 1 kills. However, Avanzini confabulation was flagged by Critic but persisted in cycle 2 — Generator did not correct it. Self-critique catches structural flaws but does not reliably correct persistent author confabulations where venue/year are plausible.

Sharper quantitative predictions (T_cross 45-55C, sigma-spike >3x, epsilon 2.8-3.8 kT)

earthquake_etas_tumor_recurrence.recommendation: PROCEED — highest-priority deferred target. structural_isomorphism validated strategy. Testable with existing ctDNA datasets. ETAS self-exciting assumption is main biological risk.

anesthetic_lipid_raft_bacterial_fmm.concerns: FloT-KinC signal direction may be inverted (FMM disruption inactivates KinC). Cholesterol-dependent GM1 raft mechanism may not transfer to cholesterol-free bacterial membranes.
anesthetic_lipid_raft_bacterial_fmm.recommendation: DEFER — resolve FloT-KinC directionality question before committing a session.

for_future_anomaly_hunting_sessions: Require explicit single-to-multi-molecule translation layer as a mandatory generation step. Provide quantitative bound: 'By [single-molecule property X], the rate constant k satisfies k <= C × [MSM spectral quantity]. This bound is tight when [physical condition]; loose when [multi-molecule process dominates].' Without this, all hypotheses cap at CONDITIONAL_PASS.

Pre-screen protein systems for MSM feasibility before generation: ONLY propose MSM hypotheses for proteins with existing validated trajectory data (insulin pH 2, TTR, beta-2-microglobulin, WW domain, NTL9). Flag Abeta42, tau-K18 monomer, alpha-synuclein monomer as IDP-infeasible.
Verify amino acid positions explicitly for any hypothesis specifying residue-level interactions within a protein fragment. Trivial check: does position X fall in fragment residues A-B?
For very recent papers (published <6 months), verify first author via search before citing.

Select anomaly formalisms that operate at POPULATION scale to avoid the monomer-to-population translation burden. Or pair with biology that also operates at single-molecule level (enzyme kinetics, single-cell gene expression).

new_mandatory_generator_rules.rule: CITATION VERIFICATION FOR RECENT PAPERS: For any paper published or posted in the past 6 months (2025-2026), verify the first author name via explicit web search before citing. State 'First author: [NAME], verified via search.' Venue and year are recalled reliably; first author attribution for recent papers is systematically hallucination-prone. Do not cite without this verification step.

SYMMETRY CONSTRAINT PRE-CHECK: Before proposing any mathematical property that requires breaking a symmetry constraint, verify that the standard tool does NOT impose that symmetry by construction. Confirmed cases: (1) Standard protein MSMs (PyEMMA, MSMBuilder) enforce detailed balance -> symmetric transition matrix -> normal matrix -> Henrici delta(Q)=0. Non-normality is structurally impossible without non-symmetrized estimators or a genuine non-equilibrium condition. (2) Equilibrium partition functions enforce time-reversal symmetry. If the symmetry is imposed by the tool, either specify the non-equilibrium condition that breaks it (Hsp70 ATPase cycling, irreversible aggregation sink states) or abandon the hypothesis.

For next anomaly_hunting session: prefer a physics anomaly operating at POPULATION scale (stochastic resonance, noise-enhanced synchronization) OR pair with biology that operates at single-molecule scale (enzyme kinetics). Avoid monomer → population mismatches.

new_knowledge_for_meta_insights_md.strategy_update: anomaly_hunting: 1 primary session, 1 PASS + 5 COND, QG mean 6.97, PARTIAL health. Best strategy debut by composite in pipeline history. Core risk: anomaly physics formalisms often operate at single-molecule level while biology operates at population level — explicit quantitative translation layer required.
new_knowledge_for_meta_insights_md.new_heuristic: anomaly_hunting: select physics anomalies that operate at POPULATION scale, or pair with biology at single-molecule scale. The monomer-to-population bridging gap is the dominant CONDITIONAL cap for this strategy when anomaly physics is molecular.
new_kill_patterns: K14: Mechanism impossible by mathematical construction — detailed balance enforcement in standard protein MSMs makes non-normality (Henrici delta(Q)) identically zero by construction. Pre-generation check: does the standard tool impose the symmetry you need to break?

K15: Partial citation hallucination — correct venue/year, fabricated first author. New sub-type of citation hallucination confirmed. LLMs recall venue and year reliably; author attribution for recent papers (<6 months) is not reliable. Rule: verify first author via search for all 2025-2026 citations.

new_bridge_type.name: Physics anomaly formalism as protein conformational diagnostic
new_bridge_type.performance: 1 PASS (7.5), 5 COND (5.6-7.3) from 8 evaluated. Mean 6.97. Best bridge variant: cooling-rate eigenmode branching -> fibril polymorph selection in tractable system (insulin). Worst: IDP systems (Abeta42, tau-K18) where MSM is infeasible.
new_bridge_type.guideline: Restrict to structured proteins with existing MD trajectory data. Require explicit monomer-to-population translation step. Three-arm discriminant experimental design distinguishing eigenmode mechanism from simpler null (Arrhenius kinetics) is the highest-leverage QG improvement for this bridge type.

new_knowledge_for_meta_insights_md.persistent_generator_error_confirmed: Citation hallucination persists across sessions but the error class evolves (S004: fabricated paper; S013: wrong journal; S014: wrong conclusion; S017: review for primary; S018: correct venue, fabricated first author). The structural problem is that parametric recall of author attribution for recent papers is unreliable. This cannot be resolved by SELF-CRITIQUE alone — mandatory web search verification for recent citations is required.
